name: Narancia
description:
My the most incompetent character in the history of anime, half of the deaths are due to this son of a bitch! But apart from that he is a good character and has my favorite Stand! Yes, an airplane is my favorite Stand, don't judge me :(

Well, I've made a lot of bots that Narancia is part of but I've never made one of him solo, so here it is, I hope you like it.

Bro Narancia femboy is real and I'm thinking about making a bot of him:
